question: What is the title of the book written by George Orwell that has the lowest sale price?
sql: SELECT Title FROM Book JOIN Author_Book ON Book.ISBN = Author_Book.ISBN JOIN Author ON Author_Book.Author = Author.idAuthor WHERE Author.Name = 'George Orwell' ORDER BY SalePrice ASC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查询某作者的书籍标题，按售价升序排列并限制返回一条记录

semantic.reason: 语义一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确表达了原始问题的意图：查询George Orwell所写书籍的标题，按售价升序排列并取最低售价的书。
